name: Liza Minnelli's Salade De Provence
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the frozen corn to room temperature.
2. Cook the corn over moderate heat until tender. Drain and set aside.
3. Peel and remove the white pith from the grapefruit. Separate the sections, cut each section in half, and pat dry with paper towels.
4. Cut the hearts of palm into thin slices.
5. Wipe the mushrooms clean, trim the ends, and slice very thinly.
6. In a large salad bowl, combine the mustard, salt, pepper, and vinegar. Stir until everything has dissolved.
7. Slowly pour in the safflower oil while whisking constantly until smooth.
8. Attractively arrange the grapefruit and vegetables in the bowl.
9. Bring to the table and toss just before serving.
